description:
BA connected allows users to link their digital signage authoring to a robust networking management solution


Improvements
- BCN-19211: Added authoring support for EV445 and EV455 players.
- BCN-19062: Added BrightAuthor:connected script support for EV445 and EV455 players.
- BCN-19268: Renamed the "Flash Memory" tab in the Diagnostic Web Server (DWS) to "Flash".
Fixes
- BCN-19149: Fixed an issue in the SD tab of the DWS where long filenames in the File Upload list would overlap with other UI elements making the filename unreadable.
- BCN-19183: Fixed an issue where the number of subscriptions and number of subscriptions in use were not being shown in Dashboard > Subscription Usage.
- BCN-19265: When accessing the DWS locally, the Storage field (DWS > Diagnostics > Format Storage) would show empty. This has been fixed.
- BCN-19270: Fixed an issue where duplicate Flash tabs would appear in the DWS when "flash" is entered as a Storage Location (DWS > Advanced > Storage Location).
- BCN-21037: Fixed an issue where a "500 Internal Server Error" would occur when players are playing a presentation with a Media List widget populated from a Dynamic Playlist.
- BCN-21087: Fixed an issue where the Storage Information (DWS > SD) would show as 0% used even when the storage was full.
